summary: Tested Berechtigungssystem (permissions management) for Mitarbeiter module. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend Settings -> Benutzer tab with permissions modal working correctly. Permission enforcement verified: h.bolanka (buchhaltung) correctly blocked from creating/deleting Mitarbeiter via API (403 response).

integration_issues.issue: h.bolanka can access the 'Neuer Mitarbeiter' form UI even though they don't have permission. Backend correctly blocks the API call with 403, but UX could be improved by hiding/disabling the button for users without mitarbeiter_anlegen_loeschen permission.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Hide or disable 'Neuer Mitarbeiter' button for users without mitarbeiter_anlegen_loeschen permission (current behavior is acceptable - backend blocks the action)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor UX improvement suggested)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Berechtigungssystem fully tested. Backend permission checks working correctly via check_berechtigung() helper. Frontend permissions modal at Settings -> Benutzer -> Rechte button working. All 7 permission areas tested: mitarbeiter_stammdaten, mitarbeiter_lohn, mitarbeiter_urlaub, mitarbeiter_krankmeldungen, mitarbeiter_dokumente, mitarbeiter_fortbildungen, mitarbeiter_anlegen_loeschen.

backend_api.auth_me_berechtigungen: PASS - /auth/me returns berechtigungen object for both admin and buchhaltung users
backend_api.get_berechtigungen: PASS - GET /users/{username}/berechtigungen works for admin, returns 403 for non-admin
backend_api.put_berechtigungen: PASS - PUT /users/{username}/berechtigungen works for admin, returns 403 for non-admin
backend_api.permission_enforcement_create: PASS - POST /mitarbeiter returns 403 for h.bolanka (no mitarbeiter_anlegen_loeschen)
backend_api.permission_enforcement_update: PASS - PUT /mitarbeiter/{id} works for h.bolanka (has mitarbeiter_stammdaten)
backend_api.users_list: PASS - /users returns both admin and h.bolanka

frontend_ui.settings_benutzer_tab: PASS - Both admin and h.bolanka visible in user list
frontend_ui.rechte_button: PASS - Opens permissions modal with correct data-testid
frontend_ui.permissions_modal: PASS - Shows all 7 permission checkboxes with correct labels
frontend_ui.default_permissions: PASS - h.bolanka has mitarbeiter_anlegen_loeschen=false by default
frontend_ui.permission_toggle_save: PASS - Can toggle and save permissions, changes persist
frontend_ui.mitarbeiter_detail_tabs: PASS - All tabs visible: Stammdaten, Lohn & Gehalt, Urlaub, Krankmeldungen, Dokumente, Fortbildungen
